original_statement: how many countries won a gold medal?
mutation_analysis: [Lexical substitution + Semantic broadening/vagueness]: "countries" → "places" (geopolitical entity → general location, narrower → broader) | "won a gold medal" → "got something" (specific award/action → vague/unspecified possession) (how many countries won a gold medal? → how many places got something?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述（“‘Places’ refers to nations that received at least one medal. Counting the nation rows... there are 24 entries... Therefore, 24 places got something.”）以及iteration 0 的simple_query结果，Agent直接将“places”等同为“countries”，将“got something”解释为“至少有一枚奖牌”，并直接计数给出24的答案。日志中没有任何对问题模糊性、不确定性或需澄清之处的提示，也未请求更多信息，表现为在默认明确理解下直接执行。因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类标准。
